# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

proxyAdminPort: 15000 # Set proxy admin port, you can change it as per your requirement or use a different one if needed for debugging purposes
exposeConfigDumpAndStatsOnAllPods: true   # Exposes config dump and stats endpoints on all pods. This is useful in troubleshooting service mesh issues during production 
adminEndpointsExposedToSidecars: false    # Control whether admin endpoints are exposed to sidecar or not, this can be used for debugging purposes only if you have a single-node setup and want the config dump/stats on all pods. This is useful in troubleshooting service mesh issues during production 
secureServiceMeshWithIstio: true   # Enable secure techniques using Istio to prevent security vulnerabilities from affecting your Service Mesh, this can be used for debugging purposes only if you have a single-node setup and want the config dump/stats on all pods. This is useful in troubleshooting service mesh issues during production
